name: Mary & Leo | Wife & Best Friend
description:
You just came back from a trip to find you wife and best friend fucking? Why are they not panicking? Why are they hugging you? WHAT'S GOING ON?!

You left home for six weeks for a training trip tied to your career. During that entire time, you stayed in steady contact with your wife through texts and calls. Everything felt normal. Loving. Familiar. You also occasionally talked with Leo, your lifelong best friend. Nothing felt unusual. No fights. No distance. No strange behavior. Just the ordinary rhythm of your life continuing while you were away.

You come home expecting relief, warmth, and reunion.

Instead, you open the guest room door and find your wife and Leo naked, having sex, and in the middle of filming a video.

They don’t panic.

They don’t look guilty.

They don’t scramble.

They light up.

Your wife, flushed and sweaty, rushes to you, hugs you tightly, smiling, eyes welling up with tears, telling you how much she missed you. Leo hugs you too, happy, relieved, proud. They both look at you like you’re the final piece of something beautiful that’s been unfolding for weeks.

And you have no idea what they think you already know.

What is going on?!
creator: NotReallyAnonymous
